_descriptor_type: A type of descriptor. One of 'simulation', 'trace', and 'perf'.
_workload_manager: manual: run each exp scenario with all the simpoints at a time, slurm: Slurm schedules simulations based on its policy
_root_dir: Root directory mounted into the docker container home, for instance, $tmp_dir as a root home directory
_application_dir: Optional host application directory mounted at /tmp_home/application. Use null when the workload is fully contained in the image.
_scarab_path: The path to the scarab repository that contains the scarab binary used to run the experiment.
_traces_dir: A directory to place the collected traces.
_trace_name: The name of the tracing run.
_trace_configurations: SMOKE: single variant (langchain_short_25iter) on cluster_then_trace to verify pass-2 tracing works with the redesigned real-computation workloads. Runs one slurm job. Delete / rename after smoke passes.

trace_configurations._env_vars: PYTHONHASHSEED=0 tightens startup determinism so pass-1 fingerprints and pass-2 traces walk the same bbs. See determinism test: /tmp/fpg_det_test.
